company: Investors include VentureTech Alliance, Peter Thiel and Jane Street. Higgsfield AI
dealSummary: Investors include VentureTech Alliance, Peter Thiel and Jane Street. Higgsfield AI, an AI video startup, is in talks to raise between $300 million and $500 million in a round led by DST Global at a $5 billion valuation, The Information reported.
Canadian defense tech company Dominion Dynamics secured a C$139 million ($100 million) Series A led by Georgian.
Stathera, a semiconductor startup specializing in silicon timing, raised a $55 million Series B led by Maverick Silicon.
Xellar Biosystems, the developer of a drug discovery platform, received $50 million in Series A and Series A+ rounds.
AI operating system developer 1001 raised a $30 million Series A led by Lux Capital.
São Paulo-based fintech startup Jota, which provides digital banking services, secured a $30 million Series A led by Haun Ventures at a $185 million valuation.
Six Robotics, an Oslo-based developer of autonomy software for unmanned systems, raised €12 million in a round led by DTCP.
Queue, the developer of an autonomous robotic pharmacy system, secured a $12.6 million seed round led by AlleyCorp.
